steps.title: Use the measurement clue
steps.content: The colon explains the blank by giving a measurement: the mass was seven standard deviations higher than predicted. That detail is about how large the difference was.

steps.title: Name the size of the difference
steps.content: Choice A asks why the difference happened. Choice B asks whether the difference exists, and Choice C concerns consequences. The sentence needs a word for the magnitude of the difference. The answer is D.
